stats.note.calculation-method: Until the 10th of the month, statistics are shown for the previous full 12 months and the days of the current month, and after the 10th, for the previous 11 months and the days of the current month. This is done to make it easier to plan income.

stats.note.calculation-method-text: Note: Until the 10th of the month, statistics are shown for the previous full 12 months and the days of the current month, and after the 10th, for the previous 11 months and the days of the current month. This is done to make it easier to plan income.
